## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened. Include any error messages shown in the terminal.

## Terminal output
Run `./run.sh` and paste any errors here:
```
paste error output here
```

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 24.04, Fedora 40]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.12.1]
- Git Pusher version: [e.g. v2.0.0]
- Display server: [X11 / Wayland]

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.
